PurchaseReservedEipGroup.id: The ID of the shared bandwidth group
PurchaseReservedEipGroup.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [Idempotency](EIP/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
PurchaseReservedEipGroup.billing.billingMethod: Billing method: ByTraffic, ByBandwidth, ByPeak95 (shared bandwidth Postpaid only), or ByNetrafficMax (shared bandwidth Postpaid only)
PurchaseReservedEipGroup.billing.reservation: Reservation details. Required for Prepaid; not required for Postpaid.
